# Generated CodeStory CLI Syntax

This compact index comes from Clap `--help`, the CLI option source of truth.
Use `<codestory-cli> <command> --help` for the complete current option set.

Root usage: `codestory-cli <COMMAND>`

| Command | Usage |
| --- | --- |
| `index` | `codestory-cli index [OPTIONS]` |
| `ground` | `codestory-cli ground [OPTIONS]` |
| `report` | `codestory-cli report [OPTIONS]` |
| `context` | `codestory-cli context [OPTIONS] <--id <NODE_ID>|--query <QUERY>|--bookmark <BOOKMARK_ID>>` |
| `packet` | `codestory-cli packet [OPTIONS] --question <QUESTION>` |
| `task` | `codestory-cli task <COMMAND>` |
| `doctor` | `codestory-cli doctor [OPTIONS]` |
| `ready` | `codestory-cli ready [OPTIONS]` |
| `smoke` | `codestory-cli smoke [OPTIONS]` |
| `agent` | `codestory-cli agent <COMMAND>` |
| `cache` | `codestory-cli cache <COMMAND>` |
| `search` | `codestory-cli search [OPTIONS] --query <QUERY>` |
| `drill` | `codestory-cli drill [OPTIONS] --anchors <ANCHORS>... --output-dir <DIR>` |
| `drill-suite` | `codestory-cli drill-suite [OPTIONS] --case-file <FILE> --output-dir <DIR>` |
| `symbol` | `codestory-cli symbol [OPTIONS] <--id <NODE_ID>|--query <QUERY>>` |
| `impact` | `codestory-cli impact [OPTIONS] <--id <NODE_ID>|--query <QUERY>>` |
| `test-map` | `codestory-cli test-map [OPTIONS] <--id <NODE_ID>|--query <QUERY>>` |
| `trail` | `codestory-cli trail [OPTIONS] <--id <NODE_ID>|--query <QUERY>>` |
| `callers` | `codestory-cli callers [OPTIONS] <--id <NODE_ID>|--query <QUERY>>` |
| `callees` | `codestory-cli callees [OPTIONS] <--id <NODE_ID>|--query <QUERY>>` |
| `trace` | `codestory-cli trace [OPTIONS] <--id <NODE_ID>|--query <QUERY>>` |
| `snippet` | `codestory-cli snippet [OPTIONS] <--id <NODE_ID>|--query <QUERY>>` |
| `query` | `codestory-cli query [OPTIONS] <QUERY|--sql <SQL>>` |
| `explore` | `codestory-cli explore [OPTIONS] <--id <NODE_ID>|--query <QUERY>>` |
| `files` | `codestory-cli files [OPTIONS]` |
| `affected` | `codestory-cli affected [OPTIONS] [PATH]...` |
| `bookmark` | `codestory-cli bookmark <COMMAND>` |
| `serve` | `codestory-cli serve [OPTIONS]` |
| `generate-completions` | `codestory-cli generate-completions --shell <SHELL>` |
| `retrieval` | `codestory-cli retrieval <COMMAND>` |
